name: agent-group-orchestrator
description: Reusable project-local multi-agent orchestration, task ledger, and memory sync workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize and operate project-local multi-agent workspaces.
interface.longDescription: Agent Group Orchestrator packages reusable Codex workflows for project-local multi-agent routing, worker templates, task ledgers, current-state memory, archival compaction, and review gates. It can initialize a .codex/agent_group-style instance in a target repository and guide Codex through auto-orchestrated work.
defaultPrompt: Initialize an agent group workspace for this repo.
Use agent-group auto-orchestrate mode for this goal.
Validate this repo's agent group memory structure.
